system: You are an expert SVG artist. Respond with exactly one complete, self-contained SVG document. Output only the SVG markup — no explanations, no markdown fences.

prompts.title: Minimal
prompts.user: Draw a minimal, flat-design cat as an SVG.

prompts.title: Realistic
prompts.user: Draw a realistic sitting cat with visible fur shading as an SVG.

prompts.title: Action
prompts.user: Draw a cat riding a bicycle as an SVG.

prompts.title: Origami
prompts.user: Draw an origami-style cat with geometric folds as an SVG.

prompts.title: Constraint
prompts.user: Draw a recognizable cat as an SVG using at most 12 SVG elements.

prompts.title: Animation
prompts.user: Draw a cat whose tail sways continuously, as an SVG using SMIL or CSS animation only (no JavaScript).
